title: Login Page Confirmed on Public Subdomain
description: The subdomain 'helpdesk.net4hc.in' was confirmed by page analysis to serve a login page, even though its name gave no indication of this. This login surface is publicly reachable and is a target for brute-force and credential-stuffing attacks.
action: Enable MFA on all accounts accessible via this page. Enforce rate-limiting and account lockout. Verify the page is intentionally public-facing.
page_signals: password input field found in HTML

title: Port 80 Open — HTTP
description: Port 80/tcp (http) is open on net4hc.in. HTTP — unencrypted web traffic. Verify this is intentionally public.
action: Confirm port 80 is intentionally internet-facing. Ensure the service is up to date and properly configured.

title: Port 443 Open — HTTPS
description: Port 443/tcp (https) is open on net4hc.in. HTTPS — encrypted web traffic. Verify this is intentionally public.
action: Confirm port 443 is intentionally internet-facing. Ensure the service is up to date and properly configured.
